_comment: Curated watchlist for the daily social brief. Accounts, hashtags, and keywords we want to monitor and potentially reply to / amplify. Bluesky handles verified where possible; where unknown, the handle is marked resolveable:true and the script will attempt to resolve on first run. Weights 1-10 bias ranking in the candidate list.

journalists.name: Justin Ling
journalists.notes: Migrated from X. Vocal about migration. Amplify his parliamentary deep-dives.

journalists.name: Paul Wells
journalists.notes: Handle not resolving on Bluesky; may not be there yet.

_note_on_keywords_skip: Loaded language from any direction disqualifies a post from our candidate list. Non-partisan means we won't reply to or amplify threads that use this vocabulary, regardless of which political side uses it.
